sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 20:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 20:1
items.html: Phase four is primarily from the Tabur of Partzuf Galgalta of AK downward. Even though the screen had already been refined from there, it still does not relate to the vessels in any way, as there is no refinement in the vessels. However, when the vessels are empty of light, they are quiet, inactive. Thus, when the light of SAG reached there, phase four returned and reappeared as in the beginning. (Inner Observation, Item 7)
